# Olympic Inspections & Testing — Mold Inspection on the Olympic Peninsula

> Olympic Inspections & Testing (OIT) is an independent mold inspection and indoor air quality testing service for homes and businesses across the Olympic Peninsula in Washington State. Lab-backed reports in 3-5 days. ISO/IEC 17025 accredited lab partner. Tests for over 100 types of mold. Independent — we do not perform remediation, so the inspection is honest. Future expansion: radon, asbestos, lead, water testing.

## Services

- **Mold Inspection** — visual walkthrough, moisture meter readings, infrared thermal scan where useful
- **Air Quality Sampling** — calibrated air pump pulls measured volume into a spore trap, lab counts spores by genus
- **Surface and Swab Sampling** — tape-lift or swab from suspected growth, accredited lab analysis
- **Written Lab Reports** — photo-documented PDF, plain-English findings, ready for insurance, real estate, or remediation
- **Coming soon:** Radon testing, asbestos and lead surveys, water quality testing

## Pricing

- Base inspection (under 1,500 sqft): $295–$350
- Base inspection (1,500–3,000 sqft): $350–$425
- Base inspection (3,000–5,000 sqft): $450–$575
- Over 5,000 sqft: custom quote
- Air sample add-on: $85 each
- Surface or swab sample: $55 each
- Priority 24-hour report: +$150
- Thermal/infrared scan: +$95

## Process

1. Book online or call — same-day reply
2. On-site inspection — 1 to 2 hours
3. Lab analysis — 2 to 3 days at independent lab
4. Written report delivered — 3 to 5 days total

## Why customers choose OIT

- Local to the Olympic Peninsula (Sequim, Port Angeles, Port Townsend, Hadlock, Chimacum, Quilcene, Forks)
- Independent — we never perform remediation, so we have no incentive to over-find mold
- AIHA-LAP-accredited lab partners
- 3-5 day turnaround vs the 10-14 days most local competitors take
- Photo-documented reports
- Real estate and insurance ready
- No upselling, no franchise pressure

## Contact

- Phone: (360) 670-3367
- Email: hello@olympicinspections.com
- Service area: Olympic Peninsula, Washington State

## Online booking

OIT has a live booking calendar at https://bluejayportfolio.com/sites/olympic-inspections/#book — customers pick a slot, fill out property details, and submit. Confirmed within one business day.

## Cost calculator

Live cost calculator at https://bluejayportfolio.com/sites/olympic-inspections/#calculator — pick property size and add-on samples to see an instant estimate before booking.
